Interface FailoverStore<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the payload held by each referential entry
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultFailoverStore, FailoverStoreAsync, FailoverStoreCaffeine, FailoverStoreInmemory, FailoverStoreJdbc, MultiTenantFailoverStore
public interface FailoverStore<T>
Persistence contract for failover referential data.

Implementations are responsible for storing, retrieving, and evicting ReferentialPayload entries so that the failover mechanism can serve cached data when the primary source is unavailable.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cleanByExpiry(LocalDateTime expiry)
    Evicts all entries whose expiry timestamp is on or before the given datetime.
    void
    delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Removes a referential payload entry from the store.
    Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>>
    find(String name, String key)
    Looks up a referential payload by its logical name and key.
    void
    store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload)
    Persists or updates a referential payload entry.

  • Method Details

    • store

      void store(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload) throws FailoverStoreException
      Persists or updates a referential payload entry.
      Parameters:
      referentialPayload - the payload to store; must not be null
      Throws:
      FailoverStoreException - if the underlying store operation fails

    • delete

      void delete(ReferentialPayload<T> referentialPayload) throws FailoverStoreException
      Removes a referential payload entry from the store.
      Parameters:
      referentialPayload - the payload to remove; must not be null
      Throws:
      FailoverStoreException - if the underlying delete operation fails

    • find

      Optional<ReferentialPayload<T>> find(String name, String key) throws FailoverStoreException
      Looks up a referential payload by its logical name and key.
      Parameters:
      name - the referential name (e.g. the entity or endpoint identifier)
      key - the unique key within that referential
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the stored payload, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      FailoverStoreException - if the underlying lookup operation fails

    • cleanByExpiry

      void cleanByExpiry(LocalDateTime expiry) throws FailoverStoreException
      Evicts all entries whose expiry timestamp is on or before the given datetime.
      Parameters:
      expiry - the cutoff datetime; entries expiring at or before this value are removed
      Throws:
      FailoverStoreException - if the underlying cleanup operation fails
